summary: Register activity/wellness/events/gear/workouts as syncable with {id} resolved to the athlete and oldest as the date-range param.
reason: Every useful intervals.icu resource is athlete-scoped (/athlete/{id}/...), so the generator left only the parameter-free /pace_distances syncable and the local store stayed empty. Resolves {id} from INTERVALS_ICU_ATHLETE_ID (default 0 = self).
validated_outcome: sync --since 365d hydrates activities; search/sql work offline.
